name: Pizza
recipeInstructions:
DOUGH:
Dissolve yeast in 1 cup warm water.
Add salt, flour, and oil.
Let stand for 2 hours.
Roll out the dough or stretch it with your hands in a pizza pan.
Let stand for 1 hour.
Bake at pre-heated 425°F for 5 minutes.
TOPPING:
Heat olive oil in a saucepan. Stir in garlic and chopped tomatoes until just brought to a boil; turn off heat. Stir in herbs, salt, and pepper.
ASSEMBLING:
Top with mozzarella slices and cover with the sauce.
Bake at 350°F until the cheese melts.
